purpose: Strict reverse-mapping of the real execution flow CV -> profile -> matching -> scoring. Read-only cartography.

env_flags_relevant.ELEVIA_PROMOTE_ESCO: OFF by default — if OFF, build_effective_skills_uri() returns frozenset(base_list) bit-for-bit identical to pre-Sprint-6 path
env_flags_relevant.ELEVIA_FILTER_GENERIC_URIS: OFF by default — used by generic_skills_filter.py for offers, not profile
env_flags_relevant.ELEVIA_ENABLE_COMPASS_E: dev-auto-on — triggers cv_enricher / domain URIs as display-only; NOT injected into matching weights
env_flags_relevant.ELEVIA_DEBUG_MATCHING: OFF by default — enables MATCH_INPUT/match_debug logs
env_flags_relevant.ELEVIA_INBOX_PROFILE_FIXTURES: OFF by default — dev override that swaps request profile with a fixture file
